nodes.name: Log to Google Sheet
nodes.notes: Before import/use, replace PASTE_SHEET_WEBHOOK_URL_HERE with the Apps Script Web App URL. This n8n instance blocks $env access in node expressions.

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json;
const now = Date.now();

const trace_id =
  input.trace_id ||
  `trace_${now}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10)}`;

const frontend_response = {
  answer: "ขออภัยครับ ระบบยังไม่ได้รับคำถาม กรุณาพิมพ์คำถามแล้วลองใหม่อีกครั้งครับ",
  kb_relevance: 0,
  confidence: 0,
  doc_id: "validation_error",
  escalate: false,
  escalate_reason: "",
  model: "validation",
  trace_id,
};

return [
  {
    json: {
      ...frontend_response,
      frontend_response,
      sheet_log_payload: {
        timestamp: input.timestamp || new Date(now).toISOString(),
        trace_id,
        session_id: input.session_id || "",
        student_id: input.student_id || "",
        course_id: input.course_id || "",
        nickname: input.nickname || "",
        question: "",
        answer: frontend_response.answer,
        response_time_ms: 0,
        kb_relevance: 0,
        confidence: 0,
        doc_id: "validation_error",
        model: "validation",
        escalated: false,
        escalate_reason: "",
        citation_parse_failed: false,
        fallback_used: false,
        primary_error: "",
        model_strategy: "guard",
        model_selection_reason: "Validation failed before model routing.",
        safety_critical: false,
        usage_prompt_tokens: null,
        usage_completion_tokens: null,
        usage_total_tokens: null,
        response_cost: null,
        feedback_type: "validation_error",
      },
    },
  },
];

nodes.name: Rate Limit Guard
nodes.notes: MVP guard using workflow static data. For strict production concurrency, replace with n8n Data Store, Redis, DB row lock, or queue-based throttling.

nodes.name: Load KB Index from Vercel
nodes.notes: Public GET. No credentials needed. Loads https://creful-ai-tutor.vercel.app/KB/_index.json with cache-busting query.

nodes.name: Select KB Docs
nodes.notes: Scores deployed KB index metadata and selects up to 5 likely relevant KB JSON docs.

nodes.name: Load KB Docs from Vercel
nodes.notes: Public GET. No credentials needed. Fetches selected https://creful-ai-tutor.vercel.app/KB/*.json docs.

nodes.name: Build KB Context
nodes.notes: Builds bounded prompt context from deployed KB docs and adds strict fallback if KB cannot be loaded.
